modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add a custom layout in PowerPoint.

full_description_text: The user was trying to add a custom layout in PowerPoint during a live session. They encountered difficulties and were unsure of the steps needed to complete the task. This issue is affecting their ability to customize presentations effectively.
short_description: Unable to add a custom layout in PowerPoint.
description: The user was trying to add a custom layout in PowerPoint during a live session. They encountered difficulties and were unsure of the steps needed to complete the task. This issue is affecting their ability to customize presentations effectively.
